title: Tinkers' Compatibility
description: Compatibility between numerous mods and Tinker's Construct for 1.20.1+
body:
# Tinker's Compatibility
**Compatibility between numerous mods and Tinker's Construct for 1.20.1+**

[Join My Discord](https://discord.gg/9N8cZh3hdB) to test snapshots, suggest features and chat with the community.

## Base Features:

### Glaive:
The Glaive is a Long-Range Sweeping weapon. Originally from Forged in Fire, \
I decided to carry it over to Tinkers' Compatibility when I added Ice & Fire support

## Currently Supports:

### [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)
- **Wood** Material Variants
- **Rock** Material Variants
- Aloe Vera Juice Fluid
- White Puffball Stew Fluid
- Allium Oddion Soup Fluid
- Red Rock & Dacite usable for crafting Modifier Workbench

### [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- **Wood** Material Variants
- Hellbark Material

### [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- **Aether Wood** Material (Skyroot)
- **Aether Rock** Material (Holystone)
- Aether Forged Modifier
- Ambrogen Modifier
- Acclimatization Trait
- Ascension Trait
- Gravitite Material
- Draculite Material
- Lightnum Material
- Zanite Upgrade
- Smeltery Melting Recipes

### [Deep Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether)
- **Aether Wood** Variants
- **Aether Rock** Variants
- Stratus Block usable for crafting Tinker's Anvil

## Other Addon Integration:
### [Construct's Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/constructs-casting)
- Some materials support stats from Construct's Casting.
- All missing part textures are now included in mod resources (Flamberge, Battlestaff).

### [Tinkers' Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-jewelry)
- Some materials support stats from Tinkers' Jewelry.
- Armor Toughness jewelry Trait for Soulstained Steel.
